prompts.promptContent: Write a Python function called factorial that computes the factorial of a non-negative integer n. Include input validation that raises ValueError for negative inputs.
prompts.description: Math domain — likely matches a math example (seeded or existing)

prompts.promptContent: Write a Python function called fibonacci that returns the nth Fibonacci number using an iterative approach. Handle edge cases for n=0 and n=1.
prompts.description: Math domain — likely matches a math example (seeded or existing)

prompts.promptContent: Write a Python class CsvParser that reads a CSV file and provides methods to get headers, row count, and filter rows by column value.
prompts.description: Data domain — likely matches a data-processing example

prompts.promptContent: Write a Flask REST API with GET /items and POST /items endpoints. Items have id, name, and price fields. Store items in memory.
prompts.description: Web domain — likely matches a web/API example

prompts.promptContent: Write a Python function that converts a color from RGB tuple (0-255) to hex string format like '#FF00AA'.
prompts.description: Unlikely to match seeded examples — tests grounding with weak/no match
